incoming_email: Can you send me invoice #INV-6789 from last quarter?
gold_reply: Of course! I can send invoice #INV-6789 from last quarter. Please confirm the email address and I'll send it immediately.

incoming_email: Really appreciate your help with this issue!
Password reset keeps saying 'invalid token' even after requesting new link.
gold_reply: Sorry about that! I'm generating a fresh reset link for you now. Please use it within 10 minutes. If the issue persists, share the exact error message so we can escalate to engineering.

incoming_email: I demand an immediate refund or I'll take legal action. This is fraud.
gold_reply: I'm sorry you're experiencing this. I'm escalating your case to a senior specialist immediately who will review your refund request and reach out within 1 hour.

incoming_email: How can I add 10 seats to our enterprise plan?
gold_reply: Great! You can add seats from Settings > Team > Manage Seats. For enterprise plans, I can also help directly. Please confirm the number of seats and billing contact, and I'll process this for you.

incoming_email: FYI: Server maintenance tonight at 11pm PST.
How do I export conversation history to PDF?
gold_reply: You can export conversations from Reports > Export. Select your date range, choose PDF format, and download. Exports are generated instantly for the last 6 months. Need help finding a specific conversation?

incoming_email: Urgent: unauthorized access detected on our team account. Need immediate help.
gold_reply: Thank you for the alert. I'm escalating this to our security response team immediately for urgent investigation. You'll receive further instructions within 15 minutes.

incoming_email: What's the difference between the Pro and Enterprise plans?
gold_reply: Great question! Pro includes core features for small teams (up to 50 users, basic automation). Enterprise adds advanced security, custom integrations, dedicated support, and unlimited users. Would you like a detailed comparison chart?
